component.name: Dualcut
component.summary: Edit videos by timeline or by code

description.p: Dualcut is a video editor with dual usage: edit manually on a scene-based timeline, or programmatically through a live JSON project document that scripts and AI agents can edit while the app is open — both surfaces stay in sync.

ul.li: Scene-based editing with overlay tracks that cross scene cuts
Reusable parameterised compositions (lower thirds, title cards)
Text, video, audio, and image clips with tweened animations
GPU-accelerated preview and GStreamer-powered MP4 export
Agent-editable project files with live reload

description.p: Timeline ruler with live playhead + zoom slider, click-to-select clips, library thumbnail refresh, H.264/AAC decoding in the flatpak.
Window title capitalization; web prototype removed from the tree.
Accessibility labels on all icon buttons, undo toasts on deletes, Ctrl+Y redo, End seek, Keyboard Shortcuts dialog.
QA round 2: Script tab beside Code with clear framing, drag-and-drop import, resizable timeline pane, per-panel toggle buttons.
Automated user guide: DUALCUT_WALKTHROUGH screenshot tour regenerated by CI on every release; docs/USER_GUIDE.md.
QA round 1: New Project startup flow, Open/Import with recents, Library tab with thumbnail grid, hamburger menu + About, Install Agent Skills.
GUI parity: effects editor, scene transition picker, audio fade presets; template preview thumbnails; verified native audio crossfades.
Volume animation (audio fades/ducking), wipe/iris/clock transitions, blur + color effects, nested defs, Templates tab, live vellosrc properties.
Polish: per-frame Vello renderer caching (~130fps live-vector renders), keyboard shortcuts (Space/arrows/Home), clip-type colors, zero warnings, CONTEXT.md + ADRs + remote-build tooling.
Keyframe animations, credits/badge/callout presets, Builder-style layout: bottom timeline pane, Media + Code tabs.
Live vector sources (vellosrc, vello:// URIs), animatable width/height, cross-track clip drag.
Preview transform handles (click-select, drag-move), full lane timeline: scene-layer lanes, drag with snapping, edge trim.
Timeline drag with snapping, scene reorder, waveforms, animation editor, export dialog, save-as-template, native-first README.
In-app agent API and script panel, agent skill, thumbnails, multi-select, scripting in the Flatpak.
First release: GES-based engine with scene/overlay/template document model, agent HTTP API, libadwaita preview app with live reload, and headless rendering.
